---
name: Copilot memory fact
about: Seed durable repository facts through Copilot cloud agent
title: "[copilot-memory] "
---

## Fact to capture

Describe the durable repository fact you want Copilot to learn.

## Evidence

Link to the files, tests, workflows, or commands that prove the fact is correct.

## Requested change

Ask Copilot to create a small pull request that codifies or documents the fact so it can be reviewed and merged.

## Pull request requirements

- Keep the change scoped to this fact.
- Cite the evidence in the PR description.
- Do not change unrelated files.
- Make the PR ready for `github-copilot[bot]` review.
